feat.name: Deflect Projectile
feat.requirement: You’re aware of the attack, are not off-guard against it, and have a hand free.
feat.text: You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, you have deflected it. You cannot use this feat to deflect unusually massive ranged projectiles (such as boulders or ballista bolts).

traits.name: Monk
traits.text: Abilities with this trait are from the monk class. A weapon with this trait is primarily used by monks.

feat.trigger: You are the target of a physical ranged attack.
